name: Tortellini Al Forno with Radicchio and Goat Cheese
recipeIngredient: 1 Medium red onion, sliced paper thin
2 Heads radicchio Treviso, halved into 1/2 inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
To Make Tortellini Al Forno:
1. Preheat oven to 425°F.
2. Bring 6 quarts of water to a boil and add 2 tablespoons salt.
3. Heat oil in a 12 to 14-inch saute pan until smoking, then add onions.
4. Cook onions until softened but not brown for about 1 to 2 minutes.
5. Add radicchio and cook until softened and lightly gray in color for about 5 to 6 minutes.
6. Remove from heat and allow to cool.
7. Meanwhile, drop tortellini into boiling water and cook until tender. Gently drain and place in a large mixing bowl.
8. Add the cooled radicchio mixture, balsamic salsa, and half the grated cheese to the tortellini. Gently stir to mix well.
9. Divide among 4 buttered gratin dishes, sprinkle with the remaining cheese, and bake until bubbly and crusty on top for about 20 minutes.
10. Serve immediately.
